channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: FDA continues investigation into Taylor Farms lettuce despite false positive
item.description: As of Sunday, the FDA said it had found no confirmed positive results for cyclosporiasis in product testing related to the outbreak.

item.title: Suspect in custody after detonating incendiary device near NYC federal building
item.description: A man known for opposing Immigration and Customs Enforcement set off an incendiary device outside a Manhattan federal building, authorities said.

item.title: Judge orders Paramount and Warner to delay merger by at least two weeks
item.description: A federal judge on Monday ordered Paramount and Warner Bros to pause their merger.

item.title: How 401(k) fees can reduce retirement savings by tens of thousands
item.description: About four in 10 workers are unaware they pay fees on their 401(k)s, research shows.
